scope: A2 remediation only: synchronize product_report_controller_test.go fake ProductService.ReportList signature with the A2 service interface; rerun controller and repository report tests. No behavioral scope expansion.
claim_scope: A2 exits only when controller fake compiles against service.ProductService and targeted controller/repository tests pass.
must_preserve: Existing A1 assertions, request scope invariants, route behavior, A2 repository implementation, no JWT locals scope substitution.
do_not_touch: Production controller behavior, repository SQL, migrations, JWT middleware, other modules, go.mod, go.sum, compose/env.
validation: cd master && rtk go test ./controller -run 'Product.*Report' -v && rtk go test ./repository -run 'Product.*Report' -v
exit_criteria: Stub matches interface; 5 controller tests and 8 repository tests pass; append results to A2-repository.log; update A2-notes.md.
context_bundle: confirmed_repo: LSP found fake ReportList has ([]ProductReportResponse,error) while service interface needs ([]ProductReportResponse,int,int,error). Fix test double only. A2 remains in_progress. Execute only; do not change production signature.
